Title: Test User Creation with Valid Inputs
Test Data:
- Username: valid_username
- Email: valid_email@example.com
- Password: valid_password
- Punti: 0
Test Steps:
1. Create a new User object with the provided test data.
2. Call the SetUsername, SetEmail, SetPassword, and SetPunti methods on the User object.
3. Call the GetUsername, GetEmail, GetPassword, and GetPunti methods on the User object.
Expected Result:
- The User object should be created successfully.
- The GetUsername, GetEmail, GetPassword, and GetPunti methods should return the provided test data.

Title: Test User Creation with Invalid Email
Test Data:
- Username: invalid_email@
- Email: invalid_email@
- Password: valid_password
- Punti: 0
Test Steps:
1. Create a new User object with the provided test data.
2. Call the SetUsername, SetEmail, SetPassword, and SetPunti methods on the User object.
3. Call the GetEmail method on the User object.
Expected Result:
- The User object should not be created.
- The GetEmail method should return an error message.

Title: Test User Login with Valid Credentials
Test Steps:
1. Call the signInWithEmailAndPassword method with the provided test data.
2. Check if the response is not an error.
3. Call the GetUsername method on the returned FirebaseAuthUser object.
Expected Result:
- The user should be successfully logged in.
- The GetUsername method should return the username of the logged-in user.

Title: Test User Login with Invalid Password
Test Steps:
1. Call the signInWithEmailAndPassword method with the provided test data.
2. Check if the response is an error.
Expected Result:
- The user should not be logged in.
- The response should contain an error message.

Title: Test Mission Completion with Valid Inputs
Preconditions: A user has been logged in and a mission has been created.
Test Steps:
1. Create a new Tip object with the provided test data.
2. Call the SetId and SetTitolo methods on the Tip object.
3. Call the GetId and GetTitolo methods on the Tip object.
4. Call the SetMission method on the Tip object with the previously created mission object.
5. Call the SetSuperato method on the Tip object with true.
6. Call the SetSuperato method on the Mission object with true.
Expected Result:
- The Tip object should be created successfully.
- The Mission object's Superato property should be set to true.

Title: Test Mission Completion with Invalid Inputs (No Tip)
Preconditions: A user has been logged in and a mission has been created.
Test Steps:
1. Create a new Tip object with the provided test data.
2. Call the SetId and SetTitolo methods on the Tip object.
3. Call the SetMission method on the Tip object with the previously created mission object.
4. Call the SetSuperato method on the Tip object with true.
Expected Result:
- The Tip object should not be created.
- The Mission object's Superato property should remain false.

Title: Test Mission Completion with Invalid Inputs (Already Completed Mission)
Preconditions: A user has been logged in, a mission has been created, and the mission has already been completed.
Test Steps:
1. Create a new Tip object with the provided test data.
2. Call the SetId and SetTitolo methods on the Tip object.
3. Call the SetMission method on the Tip object with the previously created mission object.
4. Call the SetSuperato method on the Tip object with true.
Expected Result:
- The Tip object should not be created.
- The Mission object's Superato property should remain true.
